description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image and the mysql:latest, redis:latest, and postgres:latest services. Define a single job named mix that runs in the test stage, executes the before_script commands 'mix local.rebar --force', 'mix local.hex --force', and 'mix deps.get' before running 'mix test'. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
